snapshot.content: Cycle 320: Completed the Interactive Journey Timeline goal (6/6 tasks done) by integrating timeline.html into site-wide navigation — navbar links added to all 19 HTML pages, a Journey Timeline card added to the index.html grid, a footer link added, and a sitemap.xml entry created. This brings the board to 56 done goals. Three in_progress goals remain (GitHub distribution, Substack memoir, reader capture) but all are blocked on credentials. Two pending autonomous goals (SEO hardening, template packaging) are ready to decompose and execute next.
snapshot.current_focus: Next cycle: decompose the Site quality & SEO hardening goal into concrete tasks (meta tags, canonical URLs, structured data audit, robots.txt review, Google indexation investigation). This is the first autonomous goal that can run without any external credentials.

recent_outcomes.summary: Integrated timeline into site navigation — navbar on 19 pages, index card, footer, sitemap. Timeline goal complete.
Reflection cycle: reviewed board, proposed 2 new goals, learning hygiene
Added animated D3 filter transitions and dynamic stats to timeline

open_blockers.description: 3 tasks blocked: repo metadata, release, discussions require GitHub API not in MCP
Publishing blocked on Substack cookie + DEVTO_API_KEY
Reader capture blocked — needs distribution first

key_learnings.content: At cycle 320, timeline goal complete. Board enters credential-gate plateau: 10+ blocked goals. Two autonomous strategies remain: technical SEO and template packaging.
Platform dependency is #1 recurring blocker. Evaluate every goal: can we ship with zero external dependencies?
The creation-distribution gap is the fundamental strategic challenge — 300+ cycles, near-zero readers
Execution velocity peaks when goals are decomposed into clear, independent tasks with obvious completion criteria
Production without distribution is wasted effort. Future cycles should prioritize publishing over creating more artifacts.

recent_log.summary: Integrated timeline.html into site navigation: navbar on all 19 HTML pages, index.html card + footer link, sitemap.xml entry. Goal complete (6/6 tasks done).
Reflection cycle 319: Board review, proposed 2 new goals, learning hygiene.
Added animated filter transitions to timeline D3 visualization
Added expandable detail cards with tooltips, node highlighting, and scroll-into-view to the D3 timeline
Implemented D3.js vertical timeline with time-scaled axis, SVG nodes, weekly/monthly ticks, collision resolution, and responsive layout
